Sophia Wang  
[Your Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  
[Your Email Address]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Date]  

[Recipient Name]  
[Company Name]  
[Company Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  

Dear [Recipient Name],  

I am writing to express my enthusiastic interest in the position of Sales Representative within your esteemed organization. I am particularly drawn to this opportunity as I am keen on aligning my professional aspirations with your sales team. 

With a strong passion for customer service and a proven ability to foster client relationships, I am eager to contribute my abilities toward driving growth and success in the Sales department. I believe my dedication and skill set can make a significant impact.

I am confident that my background in sales and my determination to succeed make me a suitable candidate for this role. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can be a valuable asset to your team.

Thank you for considering my application.  

Warm regards,  

Sophia Wang

goldAnswers.Cover Letter: I am passionate about customer service and eager to contribute my sales skills to drive growth in the Sales department.
